title: DTBs TMNT Heropack
description: Heres a Heropack that adds the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles and others!
body:
![THE TURTLES SPOTTED BY APRIL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b88eb912458f76d3c1b9efa37e19fed025228aed.jpeg)

Description:


A Heropack that adds the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to the Fisks Superheroes Mod!



![Installation: 1. Make sure you have Fisk's Superheros installed and updated. 2. In game open the options menu and click "HeroPacks" then "Open heropack folder". 3. Move the TMNT heropack file into the folder and return to the game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320971e46b2aebb0fd8b83ef5423203a362ad3d4.png)
![About: DTB's TMNT Heropack for the Fisk's Superheroes Mod on MC 1.7.10.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/448794199e077f9728bfaaeddc5d22e821abca46.png)
Credits:
